title: cli:project-update-metadata
description: Agents need a CLI command to save optimized project context. The `specd project update-metadata` command provides this capability, ensuring that only the content is provided while the backend handles the integrity and invalidation logic.
context: Agents need a CLI command to save optimized project context. The `specd project update-metadata` command provides this capability, ensuring that only the content is provided while the backend handles the integrity and invalidation logic.

rules: The command SHALL accept the payload containing `optimizedContext` as JSON/YAML from stdin or a file via the `--file` flag.
The command SHALL delegate to the `UpdateProjectMetadata` use case.

scenarios.name: Accepts optimized context via stdin
when: specd project update-metadata is called with { "optimizedContext": "..." } via stdin
then: it passes the payload to the use case

scenarios.name: Accepts optimized context via --file
when: specd project update-metadata --file payload.json is run
then: it reads the file and passes the payload to the use case
